message:
test(frankenterm-core): add 46 VT conformance fixtures + fix DecSet/AnsiSet match arms

New fixtures: C0 controls (FF/VT as LF, CR-only), SGR selective resets
(22/23/24/25/27/28/29/55, 39/49 default color), scroll region edge cases
(RI mid-region, IL at top, DL at bottom, NEL at bottom, SU/SD preserves
outside), IRM + wide char, DECOM CUP clamping, cursor clamping (CUB/CUF/
CUU overflow), ED/EL boundary cases, ECH overflow, REP with attrs, CNL/CPL
with counts, LNM newline-as-CR, DECSTR pending wrap, DECAWM re-enable wrap,
DECALN cursor reset, save/restore SGR attrs, wide char half-overwrite,
UTF-8 CJK mixed, random-access CUP, tab stop clearing, multiple scroll.

Fix: DecSet/DecRst/AnsiSet/AnsiRst match arms in differential_terminal.rs
and differential_extras_reference.rs now iterate over Vec<u16> params
instead of treating them as single values.

Total VT conformance fixtures: 222

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
